## Question

What would you like to know?

## Context

What are you trying to accomplish? Provide any relevant context that might help us understand your question better.

## What I've Tried

Have you already tried searching the documentation or existing issues? If so, what have you found?

- [ ] I've read the [README](https://github.com/preset-io/testmcpy/blob/main/README.md)
- [ ] I've searched through [existing issues](https://github.com/preset-io/testmcpy/issues)
- [ ] I've checked the [documentation](https://github.com/preset-io/testmcpy/tree/main/docs)

## Additional Information

Any other information that might be helpful in answering your question:
- Code snippets
- Configuration files
- Error messages
- Screenshots
